programme.desc: In Portland, OR an intoxicated male suspect is brought in for DUI. In Salt Lake City, UT a happy drunk woman is pleasantly cooperative. An emotional detainee sheds some tears while in isolation. In Las Vegas, NV a man is strapped in a restraining chair.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S01 : E25 Angry Probation
programme.desc: Inmates are subdued after exhibiting unruly behavior. Anger drives emotions as a man accuses officers of racial profiling. An officer uses “verbal judo” to gain the upper hand with combative inmates.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S04 : E01 Big Bites
programme.desc: Officers struggle with an angry man after he kicks out a patrol car window. A relationship ends when a woman takes a bite out of her boyfriend. An upset wife stabs her husband and he ends up in handcuffs. A woman is happy to celebrate her birthday by going to jail.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S03 : E14 Jail Songbird
programme.desc: In Portland, OR a man in custody accuses officers of being involved in the 1992 event at Ruby Ridge. In Sarasota, FL a drunk man falls off his bike and purports to have been hit by a car. In Las Vegas, LV a daring inmate attempts to make a break for it while the supervising officers attend to a disturbance.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S02 : E09 Hopeless Hooker
programme.desc: An uncooperative woman is placed in a restraint chair. A troubled woman with a drug addiction is brought in on prostitution charges. One man is taken to a sobering cell to sleep off his intoxication.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S06 : E19 Observers
programme.desc: Boisterous inmates are placed in restraints after initiating several verbal altercations. A woman struggles with substance abuse following the death of her fianc̩, and two young escorts discuss their "observing" strategy when casino hopping.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S05 : E16 Lone Star Clown
programme.desc: Officers warn a man that dressing up like a clown in Texas is not a good idea. A shotgun is found in the hoodie of a man arrested for riding his bicycle without a headlight. A young couple wonders how pot ended up in their possession. Officers are surprised at the amazing amount of pot one can smoke.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S01 : E36 Phone Fight
programme.desc: An inmate refuses to be handcuffed while officers seek to search his cell for contraband. A man tells deputies he is known as “Baby Boy” amongst the ladies. Fights erupt during prison phone time.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S06 : E36 Landlord Attack
programme.desc: An inmate swallows a stash of drugs and then comes down with a case of the munchies. A 72-year-old offers an unusual excuse for dealing drugs to teens at a mall, and a woman charged with assaulting a landlord fakes being sick to get out of jail.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S03 : E19 Laws and Drawers
programme.desc: In Salt Lake City, UT a man is sent to a holding cell after hurling racial insults. In Reno, NV A man outfitted in just his underwear is taken into custody for battery of a police officer. In Portland, OR an intoxicated eldery man breaks into song during booking.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S06 : E39 Occupied By Psoriasis
programme.desc: An intoxicated man claims to be connected to the occupy Wall Street movement. Officers struggle with a combative man, and a tearful candy thief is taken into custody.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S05 : E10 Kick Door Dad
programme.desc: A young father pulls a desperate double robbery to make ends meet. A routine shakedown gets deadly when officers uncover alarming contraband. An inmate plays innocent about her criminal past until confronted by officers. An antsy woman’s brazen behavior tests the patience of officers.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S04 : E06 High Wire Act
programme.desc: An inmate goes on a rampage when he suspects police of losing his money. Officers have a tough time with a drunk man. An alleged prostitute is stabbed. A drunk trapeze artist takes a drive on his moped.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S02 : E16 Mr. Crisp
programme.desc: A woman is brought into the detention center hogtied. A disruptive teen is sent to a holding cell. Casino valets tip the authorities about an intoxicated woman leaving behind the wheel.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S01 : E14 Attention Junkie
programme.desc: A woman is placed in isolation after disparaging other inmates. Alarms blare while a fight erupts in the shower room among inmates. A man booked into jail is revealed to have a 20-year arrest record.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S04 : E20 Coopertive Cons
programme.desc: An intoxicated woman clashes with officers but later shows that good behavior pays off. An experienced prostitute gives solid advice to a younger woman and begs her to get out of the “game.” An angry woman smashes her cheating boyfriend’s windshield.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S05 : E06 Sinister Sisters
programme.desc: Two sisters go on a mini-crime spree, get caught and find no one will bail them out. A domestic argument about night fishing lands a husband in jail for breaking into his own car. An irate inmate blows off steam by doing laps in her jail cell. A woman finds out it’s hard to stop selling drugs when the neighborhood knows her business.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S03 : E07 Homeless Hospitality
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, NV an intoxicated man is strapped to a restraining chair. In Portland, OR a seemingly gracious man is arrested for assault. programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S06 : E42 Exercise With Caution
programme.desc: An uncooperative inmate complicates things. A man charged with DUI complains about the prison food. A security guard arrested for robbery fears that her dream job with Homeland Security is gone.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S03 : E10 Coming Clean
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, NV an honest offender turns himself in. Officers arrest an underage woman who admits to driving under the influence. A woman is taken into custody after harming herself with a pair of scissors

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S01 : E22 Attitude Adjustment
programme.desc: After cutting her head, a woman bites and kicks deputies. To investigate potential hidden meanings, a man’s tattoos are examined. A confused man is found with illegal mushrooms at a bus stop.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S03 : E16 I'm Not Jane Doe
programme.desc: In Salt Lake City, UT a lewd woman is jailed. In Las Vegas, NV a man is placed in the restraining chair after attempting to bite his own fingers off. In Portland, OR a man is brought in for possession. In Sarasota, FL a homeless man is brought in for trespassing and battery.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S01 : E20 Drunken Corvette
programme.desc: After totaling his Corvette, a man is arrested for drunk driving. Complex personality issues are unveiled while an inmate is interrogated. A man is placed in a mask after spraying saliva far and wide.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S05 : E14 Flee the coop
programme.desc: An arrested man is caught on camera making a run for freedom. An addict returns to jail and tells officers that meth is controlling his mind. Humility may be the key for one man to quit his life of crime. A shoplifter calls 9-1-1 to help him get out of jail.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S06 : E25 Double Blood Draw
programme.desc: Prositutes discuss their risqu̩ occupation and explain their fees. An intoxicated woman doesn't want her blood drawn, and two shoplifters face the potential consequences of their actions.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S06 : E29 Footloose
programme.desc: A secret stash is uncovered during a search at a suspect's property. Two rowdy inmates don't quite hit it off when they invade each other's personal space, and a jaywalker experiences problems keeping his pants from falling down.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S06 : E18 Good Citizen
programme.desc: A woman refuses to wear jail-issued clothing. A man tells his tearful tale to officers, and a chatty inebriated woman is placed in isolation.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 The Wanderer
programme.desc: Acts of aggression cause a man to be placed in a restraint chair. Jail lockdown occurs after an inmate is stabbed with a pencil. After being booked for road rage a woman unleashes a venomous tirade.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S06 : E21 Mad About Everybody
programme.desc: An inmate's flirting calms a jailhouse fight. An inebriated man tries to avoid his eighth DUI by claiming his car was stolen, and a disagreement over Faecbook puts a couple in jail.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S05 : E13 No Good Deed
programme.desc: A woman comes clean to having drugs hidden where they can’t be seen. An inmate’s exotic makeup is cleverly created with candy and toothpaste. A couple is surprised to find that holding someone against their will is a felony. Doing the right thing turns into an extended stay for a woman with warrants.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S01 : E34 Tased and Chaired
programme.desc: Uncooperative and agitated, a man complains officers are violating his rights. A “443” call is issued, and a deputy desperately needs help. Outside the cell block, there’s knockouts and bloody noses.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S01 : E35 Child of God
programme.desc: One man booked for intoxication is placed in a sobering cell for being uncooperative. An aggrieved woman claims Animal Control took her “baby.” A man tells officers he is a “child of God” and actor.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S05 : E20 Stairway to Jail
programme.desc: After falling down a flight of stairs while drunk, a young man is amazed he is in jail for refusing to go to the hospital. A correction officer tries to explain to a young man why carrying a gun-shaped knife is not a good idea. An expectant father is arrested after a gin-fueled rampage at his parent's house and misses the birth of his first child. A woman arrested for selling fake designer purses as real ones says she didn’t know it was a crime.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S01 : E16 Family Man
programme.desc: In his holding cell, a man fights officers after taking Xanax. An officer discovers a suspect may be facing criminal charges for his son. K-9 units are needed during a search for improvised weapons.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S01 : E37 Fearless
programme.desc: Toting his guitar, an inmate serenades the officers. One man protests his arrest and states that having cocaine is not a crime. A man claims to be an Iraqi War Veteran and challenges his detainment.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S01 : E31 Stabbed
programme.desc: Code Blue alarms sound as inmates start fighting inside the men’s jail. An irate man with a huge beard refuses to remove bands inside his facial hair. A man with deep stab wounds stumbles into jail.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S06 : E02 Bad Luck Hooker
programme.desc: A man brought in for trespassing becomes violent. A sex worker admits she۪s witholding her pediculosis condition from clients. A woman explains her tattoos are a reminder of the women she loved.

programme.title: Jail

programme.desc: In Sarasota, FL a man is sent to intake for indecent exposure. In Spokane, WA a man threatening bodily harm to himself is placed in a restraining chair. In Salt Lake City, UT an intoxicated woman fades in and out of coherency. In Portland, OR an amputee is detained for dodging the subway toll.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S01 : E13 Meth Rage
programme.desc: Officers conduct a strip search after an inmate is accused of carrying contraband. A repeat offender dances for deputies and fellow inmates. High on meth, a man acts erratically during booking.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Mad-Icidal
programme.desc: Deputies corral a suspect into a cell after serious turmoil. A man becomes suicidal after being brought in on burglary charges. Facing the gavel, a prisoner berates a Judge during court proceedings.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S01 : E21 Hawaii 5-0
programme.desc: A man claims royal lineage during a combative booking process. After resisting officers and harboring a vicious animal, a man is arrested. Later, intoxicated individuals create havoc for officers.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S04 : E05 Superhero Citing
programme.desc: A Batman impressionist is arrested after punching Chewbacca. A broken arm doesn’t stop a woman from struggling with officers. A man finds out it’s better to pay the fine then do the time. A woman involved in an affair with an older gentleman claims she was set up.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S06 : E10 Sweet as Pie
programme.desc: Two agitated inmates are put in restraints to cool down. A suspected burglar expresses concern over a milk allergy, and an inmate becomes upset about the care given to her belongings.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S06 : E32 Reefer Madness
programme.desc: A drug dealer's mean-spirited girlfriend lands herself in isolation. The police deal with an inebriated man accused of throwing rocks, and guards attempt to defuse a situation involving battling cellmates.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S02 : E04 Big Angry Man
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, NV an upset inmate damages the door on a patrol car. In Portland, OR a man over-estimates the legal consequences of his actions. In Tacoma, WA a couple charged with domestic violence denies getting physical even though there’s blood in the woman’s hair.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Fight For Your Right
programme.desc: A woman is placed into a restraint chair during intake. Punches are thrown and questions are asked after a fight occurs. After dodging a bar tab, a woman is also accused of spiting and biting.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S04 : E14 One Too Many Times
programme.desc: A man learns it’s never a good idea to light up a joint next to an active crime scene. An officer encourages a young drug addicted couple to seek treatment. Luck runs out for a tutu-wearing prostitute, and officers pick up an at-risk kid for their 93rd time.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S03 : E09 That Bites
programme.desc: In Sarasota, FL an unruly detainee is sent to isolation, twice. In Multnomah county a young man feverishly waits for his release. In Portland, OR a man is jailed for bitting his girlfriend.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S01 : E19 Money Buys Justice
programme.desc: A man under the influence states money will buy his freedom after threatening police with a gun. Individuals arrested for possession blame each other. A man arrested for drunk driving becomes unruly.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S06 : E28 King of Karate
programme.desc: An intoxicated man thinks the doctors are CIA agents. A homeless karate practitioner's actions land him in an isolated cell, and a Canadian man with no pants wants to arm wrestle.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S06 : E04 O Canada
programme.desc: A jail chaplain counsels a sad inmate. An intoxicated woman demands to talk to the Canadian Embassy.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S02 : E07 Ultimate Fighter

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S03 : E03 Photo Flip Off
programme.desc: In Salt Lake City, UT a combative inmate provokes the use of pepper spray. In Sarasota, FL a drunk woman is uncooperative during processing. In Spokane, WA a man attempts to flip off the camera while taking his mug-shot.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S03 : E13 Locked Out
programme.desc: In Salt Lake City, UT a disorderly man in the detention center is sent to the padded room. A Sarasota, FL man hurls insults at officers while in custody. In Portland, OR a drunk and destructive young man is placed in the drunk-tank. In Las Vegas, NV a woman tries to lie about the reasons behind her detention.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S06 : E12 Housing Fight
programme.desc: Needles are found on one woman while a stun gun is discovered on another. A DUI test stirs up bad memories for a man driving while intoxicated, and a convicted murderer becomes violent.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S03 : E12 Pedaling Backwards
programme.desc: In Salt Lake City, UT officers break up an altercation between two inmates. In Portland, OR a belligerent man questions the authorities. In Sarasota, FL a man is busted for DUI. In Las Vegas, NV a woman is taken into custody for battery.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S06 : E06 School of Rock

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S03 : E11 Joyriders

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S06 : E07 Pot Farmer
programme.desc: A man is charged with possession of an illegal substance. Police arrest a woman for narcotics, and a couple is caught passing a fake prescription.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S03 : E01 Mean Marine

programme.title: Jail

programme.desc: In San Diego, CA an officer grapples with a combative detainee. In Portland, OR six party goers are taken into custody. In Fort Worth, TX a high-risk inmate manages to get the key to his handcuffs.

programme.title: Jail

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S06 : E20 My Watch
programme.desc: An agitated man is overly concerned about his 30K watch. cries when he has blood drawn. An inebriated woman threatens her arresting officers with bodily harm, and a woman has no recollection of her arrest.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S06 : E11 The Wild One

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S05 : E18 Permission to Panhandle
programme.desc: Angry over her arrest, a woman becomes combative with officers. Busted once again for drugs, a smart young woman knows she is making dumb choices but can’t stop using. programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S03 : E15 Mommy Issues
programme.desc: In Salt Lake City, UT an inebriated man gets aggressive and questions why he's in custody. In Sarasota, FL a couple are taken in for assaulting a bartender. programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S04 : E22 Rave & Rage

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S01 : E23 Spit Mask Drunk
programme.desc: Deputies deal with chaos after volatile inmates begin fighting. Accusations of deceit plague a booking as a woman is arrested for drunk driving. Prisoners are restrained after causing a commotion.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S04 : E13 Crushin

A local vagrant is taken into custody after attempting to retrieve some things from his ex wife’s house.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S04 : E17 Fight Night

programme.title: Jail

programme.desc: A hysterical woman is transferred to an isolation cell. A woman shows her undying LA pride to the arresting officers. A young woman is put under observation for threatening harm to herself.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S06 : E38 Too Much Drama
programme.desc: A ladies' man smuggles women's underwear into jail. A woman arrested at a traffic accident is incredulous to discover that smoking marijuana while driving is against the law. A young man charged with a DUI tells guards he fears he may become pregnant behind bars.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S01 : E28 Screamer

programme.title: Jail

programme.desc: A woman lies hobbled in the backseat of a patrol car after kicking the officer in the face. Officers struggle to control an outrageous man. Officers attend to a woman struck by a drunk driver.

programme.sub-title: S06 : E37 Under Mom's Thumb

programme.desc: A brawl breaks out between inmates during a routine jail breakfast. An inmate alters their uniform in provocative and outlandish ways. Concerns abound as one-man issues violent threats at deputies.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S04 : E15 Look Away

programme.title: Jail

programme.desc: A man tries to swallow his ring. A heroin addict wants help when he realizes his habit has cost him everything he loves. A habitual criminal is worried that other inmates will fight over him.

programme.title: Jail
programme.sub-title: S03 : E20 Git 'er Done
programme.desc: In Reno, NV a woman becomes violent with officers after having over indulged in boxed wine. In Salt Lake City, UT a drunk man is brought in for urinating in front of a family restaurant and in attempt to expedite his release he requests that the officers "git 'er done". In Reno, NV a former marine is taken in to custody for domestic abuse.

programme.sub-title: S29 : E14 Clueless
programme.desc: A young lawbreaker does everything she can to escape jail. Grandpa saves the day when Mom fails to do the right thing. A traffic stop leads one deputy to suspect an elderly duo of criminal activity.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S22 : E24 Kick the Car
programme.desc: Officers intervene when an estranged husband kicks his ex-wife’s boyfriend’s car. A man claims someone gave him the car he is driving. A woman claims the pills in her purse are not hers.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S15 : E02 Beads and Scalpers
programme.desc: A remorseful woman is arrested for lewd conduct during Mardi Gras. Officers are dispatched into the busy streets of New Orleans during the super bowl. Officers investigates a theft at a local store.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S29 : E20 Manic Monday
programme.desc: An escaped felon looks to Grandma for safe haven. It’s a blast from the past when deputies pull out a security device from the ‘80s. Later, worried neighbors refuse to give a dog back to its owners.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S19 : E12 Dumbfounded
programme.desc: Officers conduct a traffic stop and the vehicle’s occupants are taken into custody. An officer investigates a suspicious vehicle occupied by two women who turn on each other during questioning. An informant tips authorities off about drug activity at a shady motel.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S26 : E06 Kill ‘Em With Kindness
programme.desc: A belligerent gun-toting man doesn't take too well to some harsh parental criticism. A bike rider tries to outpace a policeman then pretends to be someone else. Officers try to coax a rattled hit-and-run driver into coming clean.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S21 : E08 Yard Work
programme.desc: Deputies respond to a call of a man shooting a gun in his front yard. Officers are called to a domestic dispute over a wrinkly infant’s shirt. Four armed and suspicious men are spotted by deputies.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S15 : E30 Follow the Tire Tracks
programme.desc: A decoy vehicle is strategically abandoned in a public parking lot. An officer responds to a burglary in progress at a tire store. Officers respond to a domestic call at a nearby trailer park.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S22 : E27 All Aboard!
programme.desc: Officers pursue a truck driving backwards on a freeway. A suspect jumps a train to evade police. A woman claims to be disabled when a pill falls from her pocket.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S22 : E09 Gimme a Break
programme.desc: Officers pursue two brothers after an attempted bank robbery. A confused man with a shotgun calls police after hearing voices. A man asks deputies for a break after they find illegal items in his truck.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S13 : E04 There Goes that Alligator
programme.desc: Police arrest a suspect for armed robbery. A six foot alligator is found on a homeowner's back porch. An Officer assists in an undercover sting.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S28 : E06 Drive and Dash
programme.desc: By running through a shower, a man tries to throw the cops off his scent. A belligerent man violates a restraining order. A husband and wife give the police conflicting stories during a traffic stop.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S24 : E17 Two Mr. Fix Its
programme.desc: A suspect attempts to flee when officers tell him they will search him. Two men get in a fight over window installation. A hotel room is filled like a clown car with multiple suspects.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S14 : E18 Deja Vu
programme.desc: A traffic stop becomes dangerous when the suspect takes off on the interstate. Officers find a large bag of drugs in a man’s pants. Officers respond to a dispute at a familiar location.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S29 : E09 One, Two, Tree
programme.desc: A high-speed pursuit ends abruptly when the suspect makes a wrong turn. Officers are forced to intervene when a jilted lover can’t take a hint. A nervous man attempts to hide his crime.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S29 : E19 Between a Bush and a Hard Place
programme.desc: A high-speed car chase switches gears when the driver flees on foot. Tempers flare between neighbors after kids get physical. A nervous driver becomes irate after the police search his passenger.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S19 : E05 Tuck and Roll, Hold On!
programme.desc: A stolen vehicle investigation results in a brief foot chase and subsequent arrest. A driver is pulled over and is arrested for the possession of a controlled substance. While on patrol an officer spots an distressed man inside a vehicle with busted windows.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S26 : E18 Wrong Place, Wrong Time
programme.desc: A man takes off from officers when they roll up on a notorious hotspot for dealers. Cops surprise a jaywalker when they find some suspicious items in his supposedly borrowed jacket. A woman takes the heat for her beau when meth is found in their car.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S29 : E15 Organized Crime
programme.desc: Emotions run high during a dispute involving alcohol and a beloved pet. A motorist struggles to keep his story straight. Deputies respond to a domestic episode and find the suspect in an awkward spot.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S16 : E01 Running Amok
programme.desc: An assailant attacks a woman after bumping into her. A woman is arrested for spilling beer on a cameraman’s equipment. Two intoxicated women are placed under arrest after a physical altercation.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S21 : E13 Wardrobe Malfunction
programme.desc: A suspect flees police in a truck over a misdemeanor traffic warrant. A man denies hitting his wife who has a bloody nose. A man denies ownership of his shorts when deputies find drugs in them.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S19 : E18 Tit for Tat
programme.desc: A suspect bails out of his vehicle when a car chase reaches a dead-end. An officer responds to a domestic disturbance call and recommends that the quarreling couple get a divorce. Officers investigate a suspected drug transaction.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S26 : E20 Not My Text Messages
programme.desc: A routine traffic stop turns into a drug bust when cops turn up evidence of the driver's sizable habit. A suspicious man waiting in a parked car can't explain the incriminating texts on his phone. Two frequent flyers give officers a hard time when pulled over in a well-known drug area.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S26 : E02 Who Let the Dogs Out
programme.desc: Officers deploy a police K-9 when a burglary suspect takes refuge in a lemon tree. A suspect on the run seeks shelter in a stranger’s house. A biker with a suspended license just doesn’t know how to listen.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S13 : E17 Give Me My Money
programme.desc: A reckless driver claims he wants to kill himself. A woman steals $1,700 from a man trying to buy drugs. Police arrest a man for drinking a driving.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S28 : E30 Trouble in Paradise
programme.desc: A homeless man decides to test the police when he thinks there’s no escape. Good Samaritans catch a man breaking into their neighbor’s car. Officers try to resolve a dispute between newlyweds.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S22 : E32 I Always Pay My Debts
programme.desc: A man tries to bite an officer after narcotics are spotted in his mouth. Officers respond to a family fighting in their front yard. A suspect claims to be repaying a debt when he's caught buying drugs.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S28 : E11 Pants Party
programme.desc: A reckless driver tries to avoid a checkpoint but outmaneuvers himself instead. Fingers are pointed fast when cops interview a peculiar group of people. Deputies dig to get to the bottom of things.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S15 : E05 Stonewalled
programme.desc: Officers respond to a traffic accident after a man runs his truck through a wall. An undercover officer poses as a “john” and later a vehicle is stopped due to a missing license plate.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S14 : E34 Naked Chase
programme.desc: Officers respond to a call of a naked man inside a school. A woman being questioned by Police is oblivious to her wardrobe malfunction. Officers on patrol order several female nude sunbathers to cover up.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S23 : E02 Checked Luggage
programme.desc: Agents of the US Customs and Border Protection pursue a vehicle. Border agents spot two undocumented people while scanning train tracks. Airport Customs detains a man when agents suspect he might be carrying more than luggage.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S19 : E15 Abandonment of a Trailer
programme.desc: A dangerous high speed motorcycle chase ends in a wreck and a subsequent arrest. A Florida woman is pulled over in a routine traffic stop and is rewarded for her cooperation. A sheriff creates harmony between a quarreling couple at a mobile park.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S24 : E22 Shots in the Big Easy
programme.desc: In New Orleans, police respond to a shots fired call. A suspect peddles a bike on the wrong side of the road with his girlfriend on the handlebars. A woman reports her husband to the police when he throws her down the stairs.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S16 : E30 Ransacked
programme.desc: An officer subdues a young man in mental duress. Officers stop a suspicious vehicle and find drug paraphernalia inside the woman's car. Officers respond to a robbery in progress.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S13 : E35 Bear the Cost
programme.desc: Officers discover a grand theft auto suspect hiding in his apartment. Officers assist the fire department in capturing a brown bear from a palm tree. Officers respond to a shooting.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S21 : E03 Gas up and Run!
programme.desc: A man is tasered twice after struggling with two deputies. A gas station fight ends in a foot chase. A deputy pulls over a pair of quarreling lovers after they run a stop sign.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S14 : E11 Naked Rental
programme.desc: Officers are called when a disturbed naked man covered in blood is spotted in a park. Officers find a nude couple in a U-Haul truck. A traffic stop over a minor violation turns into a dangerous pursuit.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S22 : E03 Dangerous Toppings
programme.desc: A jaywalker with no ID bolts away from an officer. A man mixes illicit items with his pizza. A woman involved in a domestic violence call blames her monthly issues.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S15 : E34 Copy of Warning shot
programme.desc: Officers respond to an assault call at a local residence. A juvenile with a firearm is detained. Officers respond to a report of a man firing a gun in front of his residence.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S24 : E02 Read the Signs
programme.desc: Police follow a car after it leaves a drug house. A police officer in Las Vegas goes undercover posing as a ‘john.’ Officers give chase when they observe a car making an illegal U-Turn.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S23 : E06 Invisible Intruders
programme.desc: A homeowner shoots at intruders only he can see. The driver of a stolen truck claims he’s just trying to return the vehicle to a friend. A argument about parenting styles turns ugly when a gun is pulled.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S25 : E04 Five Shots and Four Sons
programme.desc: Officers get more than they expected when they stop a cyclist and discover a deadly weapon. Four sons attempt to break into the family home after being banned. A homeowner claims he accidently fired five shots while cleaning a gun.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S19 : E11 Pay the Price
programme.desc: Officers make an arrest in connection to an armed robbery with the help of the K-9 unit. Officers respond to a disturbance call at a local restaurant involving the manager and an inebriated patron. An officer pulls over a vehicle which later turns out to be littered with drug paraphernalia.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S27 : E08 Step Away From the Cutlery
programme.desc: Cops attempt to piece together whether or not an erratic driver is in a stolen vehicle. A knife-wielding man complains that rude neighbors won’t stop smoking pot. Officers come upon an emotional man with a blade to his throat.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S26 : E01 Fight and Flight
programme.desc: A suspect flees as officers respond to a fight call. A belligerent meth user refuses to cooperate after being pulled over. A cranky husband gets busted for pot after his wife kicks over his Harley.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S28 : E03 The Blame Game
programme.desc: A woman bursts into tears when pulled over by police. During a sketchy traffic stop, one nervous passenger is quick to help deputies. A suspect blames the contents of his wallet on a stranger.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S29 : E28 Mother Knows Best
programme.desc: A defiant motorist can’t believe it when his mother sides with the law. Deputies discover a man in a strange costume during a traffic stop. Officers protect a hardworking mom from sudden visitors.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S21 : E10 Hot Potato
programme.desc: A man tosses his stash after being pulled over. Officers question two men in a fight who live with the same woman. A man says his shorts are from a thrift store after drugs are found in them.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S23 : E21 Don't Make her Angry
programme.desc: A man needs police assistance when his angry ex-girlfriend crawls through his window. Police must play hide-and-seek when they attempt to execute an arrest warrant. A man is threatened with violence when he refuses to turn his car’s headlights off.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S16 : E29 The Last Home Invasion
programme.desc: Police investigate an attempted robbery that turned deadly. Officers enlist a K9 unit to flush out a suspect. A high-speed chase comes to an end when the suspect crashes into a fence.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S13 : E19 One for the Road
programme.desc: A man crashes his vehicle after losing control while attempting to evade the police. An elderly woman with an outstanding DUI warrant is arrested for hit and run. Officers discover methamphetamine while investigating two suspicious vehicles on the side of the road.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S13 : E23 Nudged Out
programme.desc: Officers pursue a male suspect in a speeding truck and ultimately force the vehicle off the road, the suspect is taken into custody without injury. Officers respond to a domestic abuse call. Officers are called to a home where a dead body is found.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S16 : E35 Down-home Dog
programme.desc: An arrest is made in a buy-bust sting operation. An elderly man is questioned after reportedly kicking a juvenile in the face. A man is shot in the head by his roommate.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S29 : E08 British Invasion
programme.desc: A desperate trespasser attempts to give the cops the slip. A frightened man tries to get the attention of deputies and takes the wrong approach. Officers show that a little honesty can go a long way.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S27 : E06 Tazed and Confused
programme.desc: Cops are forced to take desperate measures when an unruly suspect won’t stop fighting. Officers have to contain a man looking to flee with crack. Police know a tearful driver has weed in the car when he refuses to open his glove box.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S27 : E05 Put Your Clothes Back On
programme.desc: Cops try desperately to get an unclothed man to cooperate. After a chase with a pickup truck, officers find a 14-year-old in the driver’s seat. On a routine traffic stop, police contend with a plethora of dope and even more lies.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S15 : E18 Bottom Fishing
programme.desc: At the conclusion of an extensive pursuit, the driver eventually loses control and runs into a stop sign. Officers stop a stolen vehicle leaving a known drug house.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S28 : E26 Love Gone Bad
programme.desc: A suspect plays it cool when officers try to match a gun to his holster. Poor choices in a parking lot inspire a life coaching moment. Cops respond to a call and learn that good neighbors do exist.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S28 : E05 That’s My Grill
programme.desc: A teen makes a run for it after being turned over to medics. During a traffic stop, a suspect does his best to keep his lips sealed. An angry aunt can’t evict her nephew and his pregnant girlfriend.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S14 : E28 Slow Mo’ Drag Racer
programme.desc: Officers engage in a bizarre slow-speed chase after a suspect’s failure to stop. A woman is pulled over after leaving a known drug house. An Officer pursues two illegal drag racers on a public highway.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S29 : E27 The Truth is Key
programme.desc: A desperate suspect flees from the cops after shots are fired. A father and daughter are found in fear of a man wielding a screwdriver. The police catch a bunch of pretty women making poor choices.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S16 : E26 School Zone Chase
programme.desc: Officers find drugs after pursuing a stolen vehicle. A man is found unconscious behind the wheel of a car. Officers intervene in a domestic dispute between a stripper and her boyfriend.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S15 : E09 Crazy as a Loon
programme.desc: Officers conduct a traffic stop on a vehicle that ran a stop sign. Officers retrieve birds from a fireplace and release them outside. Officers conduct a drug-reversal-buy sting to capture buyers.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S19 : E36 Double Whammy
programme.desc: Officers engage in a vehicular pursuit involving a narcotics suspect. Officers respond to a domestic violence call involving a mother, daughter and the mother’s new husband to be. An officer makes an arrest in a stolen SUV case.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S13 : E12 On the Run
programme.desc: Two suspects lead Officers on a high speed pursuit. An Officer discovers two men have warrants after a traffic stop. A man hides from the police after a domesitc disturbance call.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S13 : E06 Hide and Seek
programme.desc: Undercover Officers organize a buy-bust sting. Racoons hide out in a woman's chimney. A man gets pulled over for soliciting a prostitute.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S26 : E14 Fast Food Escape
programme.desc: When officers approach, a suspect flees into a fast food restaurant. A driver takes his granny's wheels for a dangerous spin with cops in pursuit. Sheriffs catch up to a man who fled the scene of a possible domestic battery.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S19 : E10 No Wanna Stop
programme.desc: A high speed chase comes to a halt in a residential area and the driver is taken in for sobriety testing. A suspicious vehicle takes off as an officer approaches and a high speed chase ensues. An officer pulls over a vehicle belonging to a battery suspect who attempts to eat evidence.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S23 : E17 Family Therapy
programme.desc: Officers are flagged down and alerted to a group of armed men assaulting people at a nearby home. A fight between a father and his adult son takes a dark turn. A father threatens his daughter and her boyfriend with a knife.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S27 : E23 Pass the Rock
programme.desc: A suspect uses bizarre driving techniques to elude cops. A tough officer wades through a forest of denial before finding the crack. Police search for man accused of shooting up the neighborhood.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S21 : E14 High Speed Golf
programme.desc: Deputies pursue a truck with a trailer full of golf carts. Police question a driver after finding a mask and handgun in his car. Officers are called to a traffic collision involving a semi and an SUV.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S28 : E19 Second Time Around
programme.desc: Deputies are shocked when they recognize a repeat offender. When confronted by the cops, a desperate man shows no love for his girlfriend. Officers bring in a canine unit to complete a vehicle search.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S28 : E27 Crying Over Spilled Milk
programme.desc: A suspected car thief ditches his ride when police spot him. Officers are called to a bar when an enraged man pulls out a knife. An argument over a bit of milk takes a violent turn.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S27 : E13 I’ll Raise My Voice Right Back
programme.desc: The new chief in town oversees a series of undercover drug buys. Officers arrest a drunken man who can’t stop talking. A domestic abuse suspect admits to laying the smack down on her mooching husband.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S16 : E31 Dog Eat Dog
programme.desc: Officers give chase to a suspect on a bike. The passenger of a vehicle is arrested for possession. Police are given a classic "I'm holding it for a friend" excuse.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S23 : E14 Bumming a Smoke
programme.desc: A suspect tries to elude officers by driving on a rough road. An argument over a cigarette turns ugly. Kids throw rocks from an overpass at the wrong car.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S14 : E17 Reckless Runners
programme.desc: Suspects lead Officers on a reckless car chase on residential streets. Police tend to a woman assaulted by her inebriated friend. A DWI suspect is found relieving himself in a public port-a-potty.

programme.title: Cops

programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Learn ABC with Baby Shark

programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Pinkfong Korean Traditional Songs
programme.desc: Baby Shark and Pinkfong meets beautiful traditional rhymes. Come listen to traditional Korean songs.

programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Episode 1
programme.desc: A genius inventor Poki makes toys to play with Pinkfong and Baby Shark.

programme.desc: You're watching Hogi's Story Theater compilation, an educational and interactive series prepared to you by Pinkfong & Hogi!

programme.desc: You're watching Hogi's Story Theater compilation, an educational and interactive series prepared to you by Pinkfong & Hogi!

programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Episode 1
programme.desc: 3D Pinkfong and Hogi loves to sing and dance with best kids' songs.

programme.title: Pinkfong Songs for Children
programme.sub-title: S01 : E37 Pinkfong's Preschool Songs
programme.desc: It's time to go to school! Pinkfong knows that it's hard to say good bye to mommy and daddy! But, use the magic words "See You Later, Alligator!" You can do it!

programme.title: Pinkfong Car Town
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Episode 1
programme.desc: Let's learn about various cars and vehicles. With PINKFONG Car Town

programme.title: Baby Shark Special Song
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Episode 1
programme.desc: Doo doo doo doo doo doo! For all fans who love our Baby Shark songs, here we are with baby shark songs compilation. Everybody, Let's go and have some fun!

programme.title: Sing along with Pinkfong and Hogi
programme.sub-title: S03 : E01 Sing along with Pinkfong and Hogi
programme.desc: Come sing along with adorable Pinkfong and Hogi!

programme.title: Hide 'n Seek with Shark Family
programme.sub-title: S05 : E03 Episode 3
programme.desc: Oh no~! Shark Family is missing! Baby Shark is off on a singing adventure to find them — but he needs your help! Come on, friends! Let’s sing along and help Baby Shark bring the family back!

programme.title: Bebefinn Family Song
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Bebefinn Family Song
programme.desc: Meet the adorable Bebefinn family! A kind and caring dad and a bright and cheerful mom. A sister who loves unicorns and a brother who loves pirates. And Bebefinn, who loves Baby Shark more than anything in the world! Please introduce everyone in our family to Bebefinn too!

programme.title: Zoom Zoom Zoom with Baby Shark
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Fruit&Veggi with Baby Shark
programme.desc: banana, carrot, grape, pineapple, onion, strawberry, watermelon, tomato, horned melon, grapefruit, beet, apricot, kaffir lime, star fruit, napa cabbage, orange, lime, blueberry, rambutan, tangerine, velvet pink banana, avocado, mandarin orange, plum, raspberry, broccoli, cabbage, durian, melon, sweet potato, guava, asparagus, bean, papaya, peach, garlic, tomato, kiwi, melon

programme.title: Mischievous Thief Baby Shark
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Episode 2
programme.desc: Oh, do you know Thief Baby Shark? His name is Lucky chucky Chuck! Let's sing along with Cute Baby Shark and Mischievous Thief Chuck!

programme.title: Bebefinn
programme.sub-title: S02 : E04 Episode 4
programme.desc: "Baby Finn Learns Something New Everyday with the Funn Family! Here comes another beautiful precious day of Finn, a Baby Shark lover just as our children, and his Family. Enjoy the daily life of the Bebefinn Family filled with joyful songs."

programme.title: Pinkfong Songs for Children
programme.sub-title: S01 : E44 Pinkfong Sports Club
programme.desc: Let’s exercise together! We can all be super athletes!

programme.title: Peekaboo! Baby Shark Babysits
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Episode 1
programme.desc: "Baby Shark Babysits Baby Baby Shark! You're watching ""Peekaboo! Baby Shark Babysits in the Amusement Park"", a super fun story for kids to learn!"

programme.title: Hogi's Story Theater
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Episode 2
programme.desc: You're watching Hogi's Story Theater compilation, an educational and interactive series prepared to you by Pinkfong & Hogi!

programme.title: Here We Dance
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Episode 1
programme.desc: Cheerful dances to best kid’s songs will make you healthy. Work-out and stay healthy!

programme.title: Pinkfong Songs for Children
programme.sub-title: S01 : E36 Everyday Items Songs
programme.desc: Shall we learn how to apply and use life tools safely with Pinkfong? Fashionable pencil master, marching mask, elegant ballet teacher, reliable medicine ranger, stylish scissors butler, and even cute spoons and forks! With tools friends, anyone can learn in a fun and easy way!

programme.title: Car Wash with Baby Shark
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Car Wash with Baby Shark
programme.desc: Time to wash the car~ Bubble, bubble, soapy bubbles! Splish, splash, water! Finally, whoosh~ Let the wind dry you off! Wow! All clean~ Have fun washing the car with Baby Shark!

programme.title: Bebefinn
programme.sub-title: S04 : E09 Bebefinn 4 Ep9
programme.desc: Baby Finn Learns Something New Everyday with the Funn Family! Here comes another beautiful precious day of Finn, a Baby Shark lover just as our children, and his Family. Enjoy the daily life of the Bebefinn Family filled with joyful songs.

programme.title: Cute Kitten Songs and Crafts
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Cute Kitten Songs and Crafts
programme.desc: Meow, meow! Let’s make a cute kitten using clay and fun origami!

programme.title: Shark Family Hide and Seek at the Amusement Park
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Shark Family Hide and Seek at the Amusement Park
programme.desc: Baby Shark visits an amusement park with the family. But there are so many sharks, and Baby Shark gets lost! Let’s find the Shark Family around the park and have fun together!

programme.title: Baby Shark's WHY Songs
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Episode 1
programme.desc: Why does poop come out? Why do loose teeth fall out? Let's find out about our bodies with Baby Shark!

programme.title: Hide 'n Seek with Shark Family 3
programme.sub-title: S03 : E01 Episode 1
programme.desc: Oh? Where did Baby Shark and Shark Family go? Help Pinkfong to find all the Shark Family!

programme.title: Baby Shark Toy Song
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Baby Shark Toy Song
programme.desc: Have joyful learning and singing with Baby Shark and the Shark Family toy!

programme.title: Hoi's Playground
programme.sub-title: S02 : E01 Episode 1
programme.desc: Pinkfong and Baby Shark's awesome friend, Hoi, is back! With him, you'll find lots of fun songs and games! Let's have some fun with Hoi!

programme.title: Storytime with Pinkfong and Animal Friends
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Episode 2
programme.desc: Shall we go out to meet our fun animal friends in the woods? Fun animal friends are waiting for us, including a pig with a cute twisty tail, a detective squirrel looking for acorns, and a rhinoceros jumping around! Let's all start together!

programme.title: Reading Stories with Pinkfong
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Pinkfong Kids Art Gallery
programme.desc: The perfect introduction to art for children. Enjoy and appreciate art with 110 masterpieces!

programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Pinkfong Star Sign Stories
programme.desc: A compilation of exciting and beautiful stories about different constellation re-made by Pinkfong

programme.title: Baby Shark Word Songs

programme.title: Endless Heavyness
programme.desc: Dive into pure power and unrelenting energy. Endless Heavyness is a non-stop wall of sound designed to hit hard and stay loud. No pauses, no compromises—just the most massive tracks to keep the momentum going. It’s not just loud; it’s eternal.

programme.title: Rock Bottom
programme.desc: Found your new baseline. Rock Bottom digs deep into the rawest hard rock and alt-anthems. We’re hitting the floor with heavy riffs and soulful grit—no shovels required, just volume. This is the foundation of everything that kicks.

programme.title: Manic Ritual
programme.desc: Lose yourself in the flickering shadows of distortion. A hypnotic sequence of sonic violence and dark imagery designed to unsettle the soul. Bow to the heavy. Welcome to the Manic Ritual.

programme.title: Flying V
programme.desc: Discover how the Flying V revolutionized Rock and Metal. Featuring icons from Metallica, Megadeth, Slayer, and Judas Priest, this documentary explores the history and secrets behind the world’s most unique guitar and the legends who play it.

programme.title: Where Heavy Music Lives
programme.desc: Your official gateway to the underground. Discover your first distorted riff or find a circle of peers who "get it." Welcome to the neighborhood—it’s loud, it’s proud, and there’s always room for one more.

programme.title: Night Time Metal
programme.desc: The sun is down, the filters are off, and the real chaos begins. Brace yourself for the raw, uncensored side of the scene too heavy for daylight. This is the unfiltered truth of the underground. Adult ears only.

programme.title: Wishbone Ash - Live in London - 40th Anniversary Concert
programme.desc: Witness a sold-out milestone at Shepherd’s Bush Theatre. Wishbone Ash marks 40 years with a career-spanning set of legends and new hits, plus special guests. It’s a high-energy celebration of guitar-driven rock history.

programme.title: Together We Rise
programme.desc: A tribute to the global brotherhood that refuses to fit in. This collection celebrates the unity that turns fans into a tribe. In this pit, no one stands alone—together, we are the loudest force on earth.

programme.title: The Home of Heavy
programme.desc: Step into the headquarters for everything that shakes the earth. From the pillars of the classics to the pioneers of the new era, this is where the heart of metal beats loudest. This is where you belong.

programme.title: Heavy Pumping
programme.desc: Ditch the pre-workout and let the riffs do the heavy lifting. This high-octane blast of speed and power is designed to fuel your gains or ignite a living room mosh pit. High BPMs, crushing drums, and zero excuses.

programme.title: For Metalheads Only
programme.desc: Leave the rock anthems at the door—this is 100% pure steel. We’ve dialed the distortion to eleven for a lineup strictly for the heavy-duty fans. No compromises, no fillers, just total sonic devastation.

programme.title: Wishbone Ash - Live In Hamburg
programme.desc: Recorded live in Hamburg, this 2007 concert features a high-voltage mix of new material and legendary classics. Experience the enduring power of a hard rock institution with over 30 years of history on the stage.

programme.title: New Rock And Metal Videos For You
programme.desc: Stay ahead of the curve with the freshest drops from the global underground. From world premieres to the latest studio masterpieces, we’ve gathered the newest sonic assaults in one place. If it’s loud and new, it’s here.

programme.title: Finnish Metal Special
programme.desc: From the frozen North comes a sound of haunting melodies and raw intensity. Dive into Finland’s finest, where melancholic atmospheres meet the power of the thousand lakes. It’s a masterclass in darkness and ice-cold riffs.

programme.title: Your Pulse Of Metal
programme.desc: Sync your heartbeat to the complex rhythms of the underground. This collection dives into technical mastery and hidden gems that push your adrenaline. If you’re ready to feel the music in your veins, we’ve got the tracks.

programme.title: Night Time Metal
programme.desc: The sun is down, the filters are off, and the real chaos begins. Brace yourself for the raw, uncensored side of the scene too heavy for daylight. This is the unfiltered truth of the underground. Adult ears only.

programme.title: Wishbone Ash - Live in London - 30th Anniversary Concert
programme.desc: An essential piece of rock history. Since 1969, Wishbone Ash has taken their legendary twin-guitar sound across the globe. Witness this milestone 30th-anniversary performance captured live in London.

programme.title: The Art Of Destruction
programme.desc: Founded in 1982, DESTRUCTION is a "Big Three" titan of German thrash alongside Kreator and Sodom. With uncompromising music and high-energy shows, they’ve thrilled millions. Discover the story of a global force that helped define the genre.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.sub-title: S02 : E04 Spring Fusion
programme.desc: Crispy, crunchy, salty, and sweet - Chef Spencer Watts prepares a Spring-inspired Thai feast in under 30 minutes, for around 30 dollars.

programme.title: Fresh Market Dinners
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Honeycomb, Shallots and Iceberg Lettuce
programme.desc: Host Amanda Herrera transforms fresh market ingredients into two irresistible dishes, including a one pot Lamb Curry with Honeycomb.

programme.title: Fresh Market Dinners
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Patty Pan Summer Squash and Cabbage
programme.desc: Host Amanda Herrera grills up two dinner recipes using patty pan summer squash and cabbage that she picked up from the market.

programme.title: Gusto's QR Countdown
programme.sub-title: S02 : E12 Raw
programme.desc: Unlock Gusto TV's top recipes on QR Countdown! Thousands of viewers scan our QR codes to access our delicious dishes. Now, we're serving up 8 of our most popular raw recipes, from hosts like Pino De Cirbo and Vanessa Gianfrancesco.

programme.title: Gusto's QR Countdown
programme.sub-title: S02 : E13 Beans
programme.desc: Unlock Gusto TV's top recipes on QR Countdown! Thousands of viewers scan our QR codes to access our delicious dishes. Now, we're serving up 8 of our most recipes with beans, from hosts like Pino De Cirbo and Vanessa Gianfrancesco.

programme.title: Griddle Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Searing Steak Perfection
programme.desc: Steak gets the griddle treatment in a celebration of texture and taste. From smoky crusts to tender centers, explore how temperature control and creative seasoning redefine what perfection means on a sizzling surface.

programme.title: Griddle Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 $25 Feasts: Budget Meals
programme.desc: A modest budget inspires bold ideas as just twenty five dollars stretches into satisfying, flavor-packed griddle meals. Simple ingredients are transformed with imagination and skill, proving that good food doesn’t have to come with a high price tag.

programme.title: Griddle Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Hibachi at Home
programme.desc: The rich heritage of hibachi meets modern griddle artistry. Dive into the origins of teppan-style cooking while exploring new sauces, sizzling techniques, and flavor-packed innovations that bring restaurant-style magic to the home griddle.

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 A Barbeque Classic: Ribs
programme.desc: Grill master Spencer Watts shows us four ways to barbeque a classic. Succulent, tender, mouth-watering ribs.

programme.title: Cook the Books
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 Eat, Habibi, Eat!
programme.desc: Chef-host Shahir Massoud prepares recipes from his own award-winning cookbook, Eat, Habibi, Eat! Follow along as Shahir prepares a beautiful beet dip, Egyptian-inspired lamb chops, grilled whole fish, and much more!

programme.title: Cook the Books
programme.sub-title: S02 : E01 Chinese-ish
programme.desc: Chef-host Shahir Massoud tries out recipes from an award-winning cookbook: Chinese-ish by Joanna Hu and Rosheen Kaul! Follow along as Shahir makes fried rice fit for a billionaire, Australian-inspired shrimp toast, comforting chicken soup, and much more!

programme.title: Blitz!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E01 Pino Di Cerbo
programme.desc: BLITZ! is an all-new cooking show! Imagine being next to Pino Di Cerbo as they cook their fav dishes!

programme.title: Blitz!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E02 More Pino Di Cerbo
programme.desc: BLITZ! is an all-new cooking show! Imagine being next to Pino Di Cerbo as they cook their fav dishes!

programme.title: Griddle Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Searing Steak Perfection
programme.desc: Steak gets the griddle treatment in a celebration of texture and taste. From smoky crusts to tender centers, explore how temperature control and creative seasoning redefine what perfection means on a sizzling surface.

programme.title: Griddle Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 $25 Feasts: Budget Meals
programme.desc: A modest budget inspires bold ideas as just twenty five dollars stretches into satisfying, flavor-packed griddle meals. Simple ingredients are transformed with imagination and skill, proving that good food doesn’t have to come with a high price tag.

programme.title: Griddle Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Hibachi at Home
programme.desc: The rich heritage of hibachi meets modern griddle artistry. Dive into the origins of teppan-style cooking while exploring new sauces, sizzling techniques, and flavor-packed innovations that bring restaurant-style magic to the home griddle.

programme.title: The Wizard of Whatever
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Papaya Salad, Carrot Hog Dogs, Squid, and Tofu
programme.desc: Chef Kyle Crawford unveils four spellbinding dishes! First up, green papaya salad with crispy pork! Next, BBQ carrot hot dogs! Followed by grilled squid steak! Finishing with Korean BBQ tofu!

programme.title: The Wizard of Whatever
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Bok Choy, Duck, Shrimp Fritters, and Pot Roast
programme.desc: Chef Kyle Crawford unveils four spellbinding dishes! First up, seared Bok choy with chilli crisps. Next, sous-vide peach duck! Followed by shrimp fritters with caramel sauce, and braised tuna steaks!

programme.title: The Wizard of Whatever
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Oysters, Mac ‘n’ Cheese, Pear Salad and Halibut
programme.desc: Chef Kyle Crawford unveils four spellbinding dishes! First up, potato chip crusted oysters! Next, lamb shank mac and cheese! Followed by a poached pear Roquefort salad, and shrimp-crusted halibut!

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.sub-title: S02 : E08 Fall
programme.desc: Host Jessica McGovern loves the flavours of fall so she bakes up some delicious treats using warm, autumn inspired ingredients.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.sub-title: S02 : E09 Winter
programme.desc: What should you do in a wild winter blizzard? Bake! Host Jessica McGovern makes sweet winter treats like an extravagant Gingerbread Chalet.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.sub-title: S02 : E10 Paris
programme.desc: Charismatic host Jessica McGovern whips up classic desserts from the beautiful city of Paris.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.sub-title: S02 : E11 Country Fair
programme.desc: Country fair treats made right at home! Host Jessica McGovern makes tasty fair-inspired desserts like classic Funnel Cake.

programme.title: Fresh Market Dinners
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Kohlrabi, Fennel, Kale and Red Cabbage
programme.desc: Host Amanda Herrera shows us why fresh is always best with two creative dishes using ingredients from the farmers' market.

programme.title: Fresh Market Dinners
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Raspberries, Mint, Peas and Apricot
programme.desc: Zestful cook Amanda Herrera scoops up raspberries, peas, mint, and apricots to use in three summer recipes.

programme.title: Fresh Market Dinners
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Collard Greens, Maple Syrup, Goat Cheddar and Heirloom Cherry Tomatoes
programme.desc: Host Amanda Herrera prepares a frittata, rosemary skewer chicken and grilled bread salad with fresh ingredients from a local farmers' market.

programme.title: Fresh Market Dinners
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Broccoli, Rainbow Chard and Herbs
programme.desc: Warm host Amanda Herrera picks up colourful produce and herbs at a farmers' market to make a delicious appetizer and tasty cold oil French fries.

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 France + Vietnam
programme.desc: CombiNATION Plates is television's best travel show that never leaves the kitchen. Skilled Chef Craig Wong is your host, and prepare to be blown away by his takes on the foods of France and Vietnam. First up? A re-write of a popular Vietnamese street snack made with Clams and Sesame Rice Noodles. Next? Marrow Toast dresses up in its tux and tails for a version made with King Oyster Mushrooms and Sauce Bordelaise. The common ingredient is Baguette; check out supersonic versions of French Jambon Beurre and Vietnamese Banh Mi. The Big Dish blends delicate sole with ProvencÌ§ale flavour spiked Nuoc Cham and a crunchy Haricot Amandine inspired Vietnamese crepe.

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 USA + India
programme.desc: Go-to Indian menu item Lamb Rogan Josh is one thing, but Lamb Sweetbreads Rogan Josh with Aloo Gobi Foam? That's a CombiNATION Plates thing! Craig Wong is at it again in this USA + India episode. After India, Chef moves on to the USA to answer the question, 'is everything better battered and fried?' with his Country Fried Torchon of Foie Gras. The common ingredient for these two distant nations is lobster, and really, who doesn't love it? For the US, it's Lobster with Cajun Spice Grits and Pickled Okra, and for India, check out Lobster Curry with Coconut Milk. The finale features Catfish like you've never seen it. Cooked Tandoori style and served with Collard Greens Paneer and Peach...

programme.title: Global Street Eats
programme.sub-title: S01 : E13 Coconut Confections
programme.desc: Chef Dev prepares some of his favorite street foods that feature coconut, including Coconut Roti Flatbreads from Sri Lanka, God’s Bread from Portugal, and Mango Coconut Sticky Rice from Thailand.

programme.title: Global Street Eats
programme.sub-title: S01 : E14 Sweet Treats
programme.desc: Chef Dev shares recipes for some of his favorite street food desserts from around the world, including Custard Tarts from Portugal, Alfajores Sandwich Cookies from Argentina, and Purple Corn Pudding from Peru.

programme.title: Global Street Eats
programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 Comfort Food
programme.desc: Chef Dev prepares comforting street food dishes from around the world, including Bindaetteok Pancakes from South Korea, Chicken Tamales from Mexico, and Sausage Rolls from the UK.

programme.title: Global Street Eats
programme.sub-title: S01 : E16 Basil Bonanza
programme.desc: Chef Dev shows off street food dishes from around the world that feature basil, including Pesto Rice Balls from Italy, Holy Basil Chicken from Thailand, and Green Papaya and Beef Jerky Salad with Thai Basil from Vietnam.

programme.title: Everyday Excellent
programme.sub-title: S01 : E16 Pool Party
programme.desc: With only 30 minutes and the clock ticking, can Vanessa make a pool party meal for 4 for about 40 bucks? On the menu: grilled steak with chimichurri, spinach salad with pickled radish, and fruit salad with coconut and basil!

programme.title: Everyday Excellent
programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 East Coast Vibes
programme.desc: With only 30 minutes and the clock ticking, can Vanessa make an East Coast-inspired meal for 4 for about 40 bucks? On the menu: clam chowder, shrimp rolls, a simple salad, and blueberry cobbler!

programme.title: Pressure's On

programme.desc: Using a multi-cooker, charming host Vanessa Gianfrancesco cooks up a four dishes that are salty, sweet, and surprising.

programme.title: Holiday Eatz
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Mother's Day
programme.desc: It's Mother's Day in the Holiday Eatz kitchen, and happy host Kimberly Lallouz has a magnificent menu any mother will love"... The recipes are made for mom, but designed for dad (and the kids) to prepare"... First step? Breakfast in bed"... featuring decadent and savoury cream cheese pancakes topped with smoked salmon and capers. Next up is an easy asparagus salad with tahini and mint then a simple pasta dressed up with pre-cooked lobster and fresh peas. For dessert? Mom will scream when she finds out this no-fuss almond strawberry shortcake is low-carb so she can have a guilt-free second slice!

programme.title: Holiday Eatz
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Mother's Day
programme.desc: It's Mother's Day in the Holiday Eatz kitchen, and happy host Kimberly Lallouz has a magnificent menu any mother will love"... The recipes are made for mom, but designed for dad (and the kids) to prepare"... First step? Breakfast in bed"... featuring decadent and savoury cream cheese pancakes topped with smoked salmon and capers. Next up is an easy asparagus salad with tahini and mint then a simple pasta dressed up with pre-cooked lobster and fresh peas. For dessert? Mom will scream when she finds out this no-fuss almond strawberry shortcake is low-carb so she can have a guilt-free second slice!
